narrative:
Jack/New Lebanon-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 966 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
